properties.name: execution.mode
properties.description: Execution mode: 'local' drives Docker on the same machine, 'remote' POSTs submissions to the executor agent on EC2.

properties.name: execution.cleanup-enabled
properties.description: Whether DockerExecutor should delete temp directories after each submission.

properties.name: execution.worker-count
properties.description: Number of background submission worker threads.

properties.name: executor.agent.base-url
properties.description: HTTPS base URL of the EC2 executor agent. Required when execution.mode=remote.

properties.name: executor.agent.token
properties.description: Shared bearer token used to authenticate against the executor agent.

properties.name: executor.agent.timeout-ms
properties.description: Read timeout in milliseconds for executor agent HTTP calls.
